D:\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MKT.dir/objects.a
D:\programms\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MKT.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\MKT.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\programms\mingw\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MKT.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MKT.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMKT.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\MKT.dir\linklibs.rsp
